faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: TenderCopilot is an AI-powered platform that helps companies prepare tender participation files faster and more effectively.
faq.q2: How does the AI analysis work?
faq.a2: The platform automatically analyzes tender documents, extracts requirements, checks eligibility, and suggests pricing strategies.
faq.a3: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption, your data is stored on European servers, and we maintain full GDPR compliance.
faq.q4: Can I try it for free?
faq.a4: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.
faq.a5: Yes, we support searching and analyzing tenders from ESHDHS, Promitheus, Diavgeia, and 19+ additional sources.
